name: Anhui Xinli Finance Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Xinli Finance Co., Ltd. provides various financial products and services. It offers small loans, financing guarantees, online loans, financial leasing and pawn services, and other financial services. The company was formerly known as Anhui Chaodong Cement Co., Ltd. Anhui Xinli Finance Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Hefei, China.
